rules.description: The supplier invoice_ suppliers invoice linked to cancelled visit
The supplier invoice_ suppliers invoice linked to final billed visit
The rich supplier invoice_ supplier invoice not linked to A visit
The rich supplier invoice_ suppliers invoice linked to all billing checks closed visit
The invoice is in an invalid state.
The invoice cannot be unlinked from a visit with all billing checks closed
The invoice cannot be unlinked from a final billed visit
The invoice cannot be cancelled as it is linked to a visit with all billing checks closed
The invoice cannot be cancelled as it is linked to a final billed visit
